context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 31
WINDOW: 531.000s to 567.200s (smile at 551.000s to 552.200s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[518.200-550.560] interviewee: in Krakow. My God, what did I do? I didn't do nothing. I didn't commit any crimes. And he tells me, from tomorrow on, you go by streetcar every morning to the hospital, to the pharmacy, and there you will be doing your duty.
[550.560-620.983] interviewee: For last six months, I didn't do any exercises. And I went in the morning dressed up to the pharmacy. They couldn't transfer me permanently there. But I had to go by streetcar. This was up to the end. This was the last six months.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
six months, I
